[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000111 5
1 01010100 3
2 00111010 4
3 01000000 1
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00000000 a

67 76 00000000 a match 4 5 6 7

47 74 01000000 1 match 3
50 05 00000100 1
61 16 00111000 3
72 27 00000000 a match 4 5 6 7
